description: FROZEN identity of the ONE approved ADR-0043 validation-box deploy object. The hardened provisioner reads every identity from here — bucket, key, S3 object VersionId, sha256, byte size, and the two provenance commits. Runtime environment values are permitted ONLY as assertions that must equal these exactly; the provisioner refuses (before contacting S3) on any mismatch. Changing the approved object requires editing this committed manifest under review.
